response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio did not contain vocal music, which matches the scene description. The dialogue features VTuber Hinami (ひなみ) as a guest on Laplus Darknesss's 3D Live. 2. JSON Usage: Fully transcribed the spoken conversation manually as the Reference JSON did not provide the dialogue transcripts. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are highly precision-aligned to the vocal turns and conversational pacing of the speakers.

subtitles.original: はぁー、clumsy trickでしたー！
subtitles.english: Phew, that was clumsy trick!

subtitles.original: どうだったかな？
subtitles.english: How was it?

subtitles.original: 最高！最高です！
subtitles.english: Awesome! It was awesome!

subtitles.original: ラプラスくんとあんなふうに一緒にパフォーマンスすることになるなんて…
subtitles.english: To think I'd get to perform with Laplus-kun like that...

subtitles.original: 楽しかったな。
subtitles.english: It was so much fun.

subtitles.original: よかったら、こっちで一緒に話そうよ。
subtitles.english: If you'd like, let's talk together over here.

subtitles.original: ええっ！？行ってこいよ！
subtitles.english: What?! / Go on!

subtitles.original: いやいやいや、あの、ここが、ここがやっぱり落ち着くんですけど…
subtitles.english: No, no, no, this is... this is really where I feel most comfortable, but...

subtitles.original: さっきは一緒にステージにいてくれたのに？
subtitles.english: Even though you were on stage with me just now?

subtitles.original: 行ってこいよ！望まれてるんだから！
subtitles.english: Go on! You're the one being wanted!

subtitles.original: え、今行きます！待っててください！
subtitles.english: Ah, I'm coming now! Please wait for me!

subtitles.original: がんばれー！
subtitles.english: Good luck!

subtitles.original: 急に出てくるからびっくりしちゃったよ。
subtitles.english: You came out so suddenly, you startled me!

subtitles.original: 申し訳ないです。なんか、もう我慢できなくて。
subtitles.english: I'm so sorry. I just couldn't hold myself back anymore.

subtitles.original: そんな破天荒なところが、ラプラスくんの魅力だよね。
subtitles.english: That wild side of yours is your charm, Laplus-kun.

subtitles.original: 私も見習いたいよ。
subtitles.english: I want to learn from you too.

subtitles.original: いやもう、ひなみお姉さんはもうこのままで素敵です！
subtitles.english: No, Hinami-oneesan, you are already wonderful just the way you are!

subtitles.original: もうそのままでいてください！
subtitles.english: Please stay just as you are!

subtitles.original: ありがとう。
subtitles.english: Thank you.

subtitles.original: これからもお互いアイドルとしてがんばろうね。
subtitles.english: Let's both keep doing our best as idols from now on.

subtitles.original: あ、もう、恐れ多いです、ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Oh, that's too much of an honor, thank you so much!

subtitles.original: がんばります！
subtitles.english: I will do my best!

subtitles.original: またこうやって一緒に共演できたら嬉しいな。
subtitles.english: I'd be so happy if we could perform together again like this.

subtitles.original: あ、それももう、お、恐れ多…あ、ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Ah, that's also too... too much of an... thank you so much!

subtitles.original: 今日はありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you for today!

subtitles.original: とっても素敵なミニライブでした！
subtitles.english: It was a truly wonderful mini-live!

subtitles.original: みんなも楽しんでくれたかな？
subtitles.english: Did everyone enjoy it too?

subtitles.original: それじゃあ、またね！
subtitles.english: Well then, see you later!

subtitles.original: ラプラスくんも！
subtitles.english: You too, Laplus-kun!

subtitles.original: え？ひなみお姉さん？
subtitles.english: Huh? Hinami-oneesan?

subtitles.original: あ、お姉さん…
subtitles.english: Ah, Oneesan...

subtitles.original: お姉さんっ！
subtitles.english: Oneesan!
